name: Back Squat
instructions: Brace core, sit hips back and down, keep chest up, drive through mid-foot to stand.

name: Front Squat
description: Upright squat variation emphasizing quads and core.
instructions: Keep elbows high, torso vertical, descend with control, stand without losing rack position.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Hip hinge targeting hamstrings and glutes.
instructions: Soft knee bend, push hips back, bar close to legs, feel stretch in hamstrings, return with glute squeeze.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Set neutral spine, wedge hips, push floor away, lock out with glutes without hyperextending.

name: Bench Press
description: Horizontal press for chest and triceps.
instructions: Retract scapula, lower bar to mid-chest, press up while keeping feet planted.

name: Overhead Press
description: Vertical pressing for shoulders and triceps.
instructions: Brace glutes and core, press bar overhead in straight line, avoid excessive back arch.

name: Pull-Up
description: Vertical pull for lats and biceps.
instructions: Start from dead hang, pull chest toward bar, control descent without swinging.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Palms facing you, pull until chin clears bar, lower under control.

name: Barbell Row
description: Horizontal row for upper back thickness.
instructions: Hinge torso, pull bar to lower ribs, squeeze shoulder blades, lower with control.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands under shoulders, body in straight line, lower chest to floor, press back up.

name: Dumbbell Lunges
instructions: Step long, drop back knee toward floor, drive through front heel to return.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot on bench, descend vertically on front leg, keep torso slightly forward.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, drive hips up, pause at top with glute squeeze, lower under control.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Pull bar to upper chest, lead with elbows, avoid leaning excessively back.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Slight bend in elbows, bring handles together in arc, control return.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder-width, lower sled with control, press without locking knees aggressively.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Curl pad toward glutes, pause briefly, return slowly without hip lift.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Extend knees fully without snapping, lower with 2-3 second eccentric.

name: Face Pull
description: Rear delt and rotator cuff health.
instructions: Pull rope toward face, externally rotate at end range, squeeze upper back.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbells to shoulder height with soft elbows, lower without swinging.

name: Biceps Curl
instructions: Keep elbows pinned, curl without rocking torso, lower under control.

name: Triceps Pushdown
instructions: Elbows at sides, extend fully, return without shoulder movement.

name: Plank
instructions: Elbows under shoulders, glutes engaged, maintain neutral spine, breathe steadily.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lower opposite arm and leg while keeping lower back pressed to floor.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Rotate torso side to side with control, keep chest lifted.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Swing arms, land softly on box with bent knees, step down between reps.

name: Burpee
instructions: Drop to floor, chest touches, jump feet in, explode upward with clap optional.

name: Assault Bike Sprint
instructions: Drive arms and legs together, maintain upright posture, breathe rhythmically.

name: Rowing Ergometer
instructions: Drive with legs first, lean back slightly, pull handle to sternum, reverse sequence.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Lunge, rotate open, reach overhead, hold briefly each side.

name: Cat-Cow
instructions: Alternate rounding and extending spine with slow breaths.

name: 90/90 Hip Switch
description: Hip internal and external rotation drill.
instructions: Switch legs smoothly while keeping torso tall, pause at end ranges.
